title: InstCombine: Implement SimplifyDemandedFPClass for sqrt

tests.test_body:
declare float @func()

define nofpclass(nan inf zero nsub norm) float @psub_result_implies_not_pnorm_source(i1 %cond, float nofpclass(nan) %not.nan) {
; CHECK-LABEL: define nofpclass(nan inf zero nsub norm) float @psub_result_implies_not_pnorm_source(
; CHECK-SAME: i1 [[COND:%.*]], float nofpclass(nan) [[NOT_NAN:%.*]]) {
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[ONLY_PNORM:%.*]] = call nofpclass(nan inf zero sub nnorm) float @func()
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[RESULT:%.*]] = call float @llvm.sqrt.f32(float [[NOT_NAN]])
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret float [[RESULT]]
  %only.pnorm = call nofpclass(nan inf zero sub nnorm) float @func()
  %select = select i1 %cond, float %not.nan, float %only.pnorm
  %result = call float @llvm.sqrt.f32(float %select)
  ret float %result
}
tests.source_program:
declare float @func()

define nofpclass(nan inf zero nsub norm) float @psub_result_implies_not_pnorm_source(i1 %cond, float nofpclass(nan) %not.nan) {
  %only.pnorm = call nofpclass(nan inf zero sub nnorm) float @func()
  %select = select i1 %cond, float %not.nan, float %only.pnorm
  %result = call float @llvm.sqrt.f32(float %select)
  ret float %result
}

tests.test_body:
declare float @func()

define nofpclass(inf zero norm) float @ret_only_nan_or_sub__sqrt__select_unknown_or_maybe_ninf(i1 %cond, float nofpclass(nan) %x) {
tests.source_program:
declare float @func()

define nofpclass(inf zero norm) float @ret_only_nan_or_sub__sqrt__select_unknown_or_maybe_ninf(i1 %cond, float nofpclass(nan) %x) {
  %maybe.ninf = call nofpclass(nan pinf sub norm) float @func()
  %select = select i1 %cond, float %x, float %maybe.ninf
  %result = call float @llvm.sqrt.f32(float %select)
  ret float %result
}
